result.book_thesis: American education is undermined by a 'romantic-progressive' ideology that disparages factual knowledge and procedural practice; true democratic equality and academic achievement can only be restored through a content-rich, grade-by-grade curriculum known as 'Intellectual Capital.'

core_frameworks.name: The Progressive Thoughtworld
core_frameworks.description: An insulated ideological consensus within the educational community that prioritizes natural development over structured learning and disparages 'mere information.'

components.name: Anti-Intellectualism
components.description: The disparagement of specific factual content as 'mere information' unnecessary for cognitive development.

components.name: The 'Drill and Kill' Stigma
components.description: The categorical rejection of repetitive practice for mastering procedural skills such as math algorithms and alphabetic decoding.

core_frameworks.name: Core Knowledge / Intellectual Capital
core_frameworks.description: A system of education based on the accumulation of shared, specific content that enables communication and further learning.

components.name: Grade-by-Grade Content Standards
components.description: Concrete proposals to define what specific knowledge students should acquire at each year of schooling.

components.name: Procedural Skill Mastery
components.description: The intentional practice and mastery of foundational skills (decoding, math) as a prerequisite for higher-order thinking.

chapter_previews.predicted_main_argument: The failure of American schools is rooted in the adoption of flawed educational theories that deprive children of necessary intellectual content.
Access to a shared body of knowledge is a fundamental civil right and the only mechanism for achieving true social and economic equity.
The educational establishment has created institutional barriers that prevent reform and protect failed progressive ideologies from external criticism.
The prevailing educational philosophy is an insulated 'thoughtworld' that operates independently of empirical evidence or common sense.

chapter_previews.chapter: 5. Reality’s Revenge: Education and Mainstream Research
chapter_previews.predicted_main_argument: Findings from cognitive science and disinterested mainstream research consistently contradict progressive methods and support content-based instruction.
Progressive educators use theoretical arguments to avoid objective accountability and standardized measures of student learning.
A synthesis of why the nation must transition from ideological to evidence-based educational practices to fulfill its democratic promise.

key_terms.definition: The self-reinforcing, insulated consensus of the educational community that resists external research and prioritizes progressive ideology over student outcomes.
key_terms.source_passage: They regarded my marshaling of evidence as a scholarly confirmation of what they themselves had figured out about the progressive 'thoughtworld' of American education.

key_terms.definition: A pejorative term used by progressive educators to disparage the necessary practice of procedural skills like phonics or math algorithms.
key_terms.source_passage: My quarrel is with misguided opposition to the frequent practicing of procedural skills... this necessary training being disparaged as 'drill and kill.'

key_terms.definition: The accumulated knowledge that enables a person to communicate effectively and learn new information efficiently.

intellectual_genealogy.name: Matthew Arnold
intellectual_genealogy.contribution: Provides the philosophical framework for the 'power of the moment' necessary for an idea to be heard.

intellectual_genealogy.name: Romantic-Progressive Tradition
intellectual_genealogy.contribution: The primary ideological antagonist that Hirsch argues has dominated and damaged American schooling.

intellectual_genealogy.name: Core Knowledge Movement
intellectual_genealogy.contribution: The practical application of the book's theories, showing demonstrably improved student achievement through a content-rich curriculum.

intellectual_genealogy.name: Mathematically Correct
intellectual_genealogy.contribution: A grassroots group of scientists and parents who used evidence-based approaches to challenge progressive math standards in California.
